questions.question: Saree ka kaun sa part body ke upar se shoulder par drape hota hai?

options.B: Pleats

questions.explanation: Pallu saree ka woh hissa hai jo shoulder par drape hota hai aur front ya back se styling ke liye use hota hai.

questions.question: Kis fabric ki saree achhi drape aur fall deti hai, especially for modern styles?

options.B: Georgette

questions.explanation: Georgette, chiffon jaise fabrics lightweight hote hain aur unka fall accha hota hai, jo modern draping styles ke liye perfect hai.

questions.question: Heavy embroidery aur stiff texture wali saree generally kis occasion par pehni jaati hai?

options.B: Casual outings

questions.explanation: Heavy embroidery aur stiff texture wali sarees, jaise Banarasi ya Kanjeevaram, weddings aur festivals jaise grand occasions ke liye suitable hoti hain.

questions.question: Saree mein 'petticoat' ka kya mahatva hai?

options.B: Saree ko hold karna aur shape dena

questions.explanation: Petticoat saree ko hold karta hai, usse proper shape deta hai, aur draping ke liye ek base provide karta hai.

questions.question: Kis type ki silk saree apni rich texture aur intricate zari work ke liye famous hai, especially South India mein?

options.B: Tussar Silk

questions.explanation: Kanjeevaram silk sarees South India ki pehchan hain, jo apni high quality silk, vibrant colours aur intricate zari designs ke liye jaani jaati hain.

questions.question: Ek beginner drape artist ko kis type ki saree se practice start karni chahiye for better control?

options.B: Heavy Silk Saree

questions.explanation: Georgette ya chiffon jaise lightweight fabrics ko handle karna easy hota hai, aur inmein pleats banana bhi aasan hota hai, jo beginners ke liye ideal hai.

questions.question: Saree ke pallu ko 'seedha pallu' style mein drape karne se konsi regional style ki pehchan hoti hai?

options.B: Gujarati style

questions.explanation: Seedha pallu style, jismein pallu front se right shoulder par aata hai, khas taur par Gujarati aur Rajasthani draping mein common hai.

questions.question: Agar client ki height kam hai, toh unhe kis type ki border wali saree recommend karni chahiye?

options.B: No border

questions.explanation: Kam height wali ladies ko thin border wali sarees suggest karni chahiye kyunki broad borders unki height ko aur kam dikha sakte hain.

questions.question: 'Jacquard' weave wale fabrics mein kya special hota hai?

options.A: Unmein sirf plain colours hote hain
options.B: Unmein intricate patterns directly fabric mein woven hote hain
options.C: Ye sirf synthetic fabrics hote hain

questions.explanation: Jacquard weave ek technique hai jismein complex patterns aur designs directly fabric mein weave kiye jaate hain, na ki print kiye jaate hain.

questions.question: Saree ke 'body' section ka kya role hota hai in terms of design?

options.B: Yeh saree ka main canvas hota hai jahan patterns aur motifs hote hain
options.C: Yeh sirf pallu ko support karta hai
options.D: Yeh sirf pleats banane ke liye hota hai

questions.explanation: Saree ka body section uska sabse bada hissa hota hai aur yeh main canvas ki tarah kaam karta hai jahan par saree ke primary patterns, motifs aur colours hote hain.

questions.question: Crepe fabric ki saree ka main characteristic kya hai?

options.B: Crinkled ya puckered surface

questions.explanation: Crepe fabric apni distinctive crinkled ya puckered surface ke liye jaana jaata hai, jo use ek unique texture deta hai aur accha drape provide karta hai.

questions.question: Ek 'powerloom' saree aur 'handloom' saree mein kya primary difference hota hai?

options.A: Powerloom sarees zyada expensive hoti hain
options.B: Handloom sarees machine se banti hain
options.C: Powerloom sarees machine-made hoti hain, handloom sarees haath se banti hain
options.D: Handloom sarees mein designs nahi hote

questions.explanation: Powerloom sarees machines par banti hain, jabki handloom sarees haath se bunne wale karigaron dwara banayi jaati hain, jiske karan unmein ek unique texture aur craftmanship hoti hai.

questions.question: Saree ke 'fall' se kya matlab hai?

options.B: Saree ke niche ka hissa jo floor ko touch karta hai
options.C: Saree ka fabric kaise body par drape hota hai

questions.explanation: Saree ka 'fall' uski draping quality ko refer karta hai, ki fabric body par kitni smoothly aur gracefully drape hota hai.

questions.question: Net fabric ki saree draping ke liye kya challenge present karti hai?

options.B: Yeh bahut stiff hoti hai
options.C: Ismein pleats hold karna mushkil hota hai aur yeh slippery ho sakti hai
options.D: Iska colour jaldi fade hota hai

questions.explanation: Net sarees lightweight aur slippery hoti hain, jiske karan unmein pleats banana aur unhe hold karna mushkil ho sakta hai. Iske liye extra pins aur careful draping ki zaroorat hoti hai.

questions.question: Agar client ki body type 'apple-shaped' hai, toh unhe kis type ki print wali saree recommend karni chahiye?

options.B: Small, scattered prints

questions.explanation: Apple-shaped body type wali ladies ko small, scattered prints ya solid colours recommend karne chahiye. Large prints aur horizontal stripes body ko aur broader dikha sakte hain.

questions.question: Saree ke 'zari' work ka kya mahatva hai?

options.A: Yeh saree ko lightweight banata hai
options.B: Yeh saree ko colour deta hai
options.C: Yeh metallic thread work hai jo saree mein sheen aur richness add karta hai
options.D: Yeh saree ka base fabric hota hai

questions.explanation: Zari work metallic threads (gold, silver ya copper-toned) se kiya gaya intricate embroidery ya weaving hai jo saree ko ek luxurious aur festive look deta hai.

questions.question: Brocade fabric ki saree mein kya unique feature hota hai?

options.B: Ismein raised patterns woven hote hain, giving it a rich, embossed look
options.C: Yeh sirf plain colours mein aata hai
options.D: Yeh ek type ka cotton fabric hai

questions.explanation: Brocade ek rich, heavy fabric hota hai jismein intricate raised patterns woven hote hain, jo use ek luxurious aur textured appearance dete hain.

questions.question: Saree draping shuru karne se pehle sabse pehla step kya hona chahiye?

options.B: Blouse aur petticoat pehna

questions.explanation: Saree draping se pehle ek well-fitted blouse aur petticoat pehna bahut zaroori hai kyunki yeh draping ka foundation hote hain.

questions.question: Nivi style draping mein saree ki initial tucking kahan se shuru hoti hai?

options.B: Left side of the waist

questions.explanation: Nivi style mein saree ko generally right side of the waist se tuck karna shuru kiya jaata hai aur ek round complete kiya jaata hai.

questions.question: Pleats banane ke liye haath mein kitni inches ka gap rakhna chahiye for standard Nivi style?

options.B: 4-6 inches

questions.explanation: Standard Nivi style mein 5-7 pleats banaye jaate hain, aur har pleat ki width approximately 4-6 inches honi chahiye taki woh evenly drape ho.

questions.question: Safety pins ka primary use saree draping mein kya hai?

options.B: Pleats aur pallu ko secure karna

questions.explanation: Safety pins ka use saree ke pleats, pallu aur folds ko secure karne ke liye kiya jaata hai taki woh apni jagah par rahen aur drape intact rahe.

questions.question: Agar client ka tummy area thoda prominent hai, toh pleats ko kaise adjust karna chahiye?

options.A: Pleats ko bahut tight banana chahiye
options.B: Pleats ko front mein thoda spread karke tuck karna chahiye
options.C: Pleats ko left side mein shift karna chahiye
options.D: Pleats ko right side mein shift karna chahiye

questions.explanation: Tummy area ko camouflage karne ke liye pleats ko front mein thoda spread karke ya center se thoda side mein tuck karna chahiye, na ki ekdum tight group mein.

questions.question: Saree draping mein measuring tape ka kya use hai?

options.B: Client ki height napna
options.C: Pallu ki length aur pleats ki width maintain karna

questions.explanation: Measuring tape se pallu ki desired length aur pleats ki uniform width maintain ki ja sakti hai, jisse ek neat aur balanced drape milta hai.

questions.question: Petticoat ki length client ki height ke according kaise honi chahiye?

options.B: Ankle length
options.C: Just above the floor, matching saree length

questions.explanation: Petticoat ki length saree ki length se match karni chahiye aur floor se thoda upar honi chahiye, taaki walk karte waqt saree ya petticoat pairon mein na uljhe.

questions.question: Saree draping mein 'tucking' ka kya matlab hai?

options.B: Saree ke edge ko petticoat mein secure karna

questions.explanation: Tucking ka matlab hai saree ke upper edge ko petticoat ke waistband mein neatly aur securely andar daalna.

questions.question: Agar saree ka fabric slippery hai, jaise chiffon ya satin, toh pleats ko secure karne ke liye kya extra precaution leni chahiye?

options.B: Pleats ko tight roll karna chahiye
options.C: Zyada safety pins ka use karna chahiye aur pleats ko firmly hold karna chahiye

questions.explanation: Slippery fabrics ke saath pleats ko secure karne ke liye zyada safety pins use karne chahiye aur unhe carefully arrange karke firmly hold karna chahiye taki woh apni jagah se na hilen.

questions.question: Saree draping ke dauran client ko comfortable rakhne ke liye kya karna chahiye?

options.A: Unhe bolna chahiye ki woh hilne nahi
options.B: Unhe frequent breaks dena chahiye
options.C: Unse baat karte rehna chahiye aur unki comfort level check karni chahiye
options.D: Unhe khade rehne ke liye kehna chahiye

questions.explanation: Client se baat karte rehna aur unki comfort level check karna professional draping ka ek important part hai, jisse woh relax feel karte hain.

questions.question: Pallu ko shoulder par pin karte waqt, pin kahan lagani chahiye for a neat look?

options.B: Blouse ke shoulder seam par, pallu ke inner side se

questions.explanation: Pin ko blouse ke shoulder seam par, pallu ke inner side se lagana chahiye taki woh dikhe nahi aur pallu securely hold ho.

questions.question: Saree ke first tuck ke baad, remaining fabric ko kaise wrap karna chahiye?

options.B: Body ke around ek round clockwise wrap karna chahiye
options.C: Body ke around ek round anti-clockwise wrap karna chahiye

questions.explanation: First tuck ke baad, saree ke remaining fabric ko body ke around ek round clockwise wrap kiya jaata hai taaki pleats banane ke liye proper length mile.

questions.question: Agar client tall aur slim hai, toh unke liye pleats ko kaise banana chahiye?

options.B: Thoda broader aur evenly spread

questions.explanation: Tall aur slim body types par broader aur evenly spread pleats acchi lagti hain, jo unki figure ko complement karti hain aur volume add karti hain.

questions.question: Draping ke dauran, saree ki length adjust karne ke liye kya karna chahiye?

options.A: Petticoat ki height adjust karni chahiye
options.B: Saree ko upar ya neeche tuck karna chahiye
options.D: Blouse ki length adjust karni chahiye

questions.explanation: Saree ki length ko adjust karne ke liye usse petticoat ke waistband mein upar ya neeche tuck kiya jaata hai, taaki desired length achieve ho.

questions.question: Saree ko neat aur wrinkle-free rakhne ke liye draping se pehle kya karna essential hai?

options.B: Saree ko fold karke rakhna
options.C: Saree ko achhe se iron karna

questions.explanation: Ek neat aur wrinkle-free drape ke liye draping se pehle saree ko achhe se iron karna bahut zaroori hai.

questions.question: Saree draping ke liye ideal lighting conditions kya honi chahiye?

options.B: Natural daylight ya bright, even lighting

questions.explanation: Natural daylight ya bright, even lighting mein draping karna sabse best hota hai taaki folds, pleats aur overall drape clearly dikhe aur koi flaw miss na ho.

questions.question: Agar client ko saree mein movement ki freedom chahiye, toh draping ko kaise adjust karna chahiye?

options.A: Saree ko bahut tight drape karna chahiye
options.B: Pleats ko thoda loose rakhna chahiye aur pallu ko comfortably drape karna chahiye
options.C: Saree ko shorter drape karna chahiye
options.D: Sirf heavy fabrics use karne chahiye

questions.explanation: Movement ki freedom ke liye pleats ko thoda loose rakhna chahiye aur pallu ko aise drape karna chahiye jisse arms freely move kar saken. Bahut tight drape movement ko restrict karta hai.

questions.question: Bengali style saree draping mein pallu kahan se aata hai?

options.B: Back se left shoulder par aur phir front mein
options.D: Right shoulder par pin kiya hua

questions.explanation: Bengali style mein pallu back se left shoulder par aata hai, aur phir front mein laakar uske corner ko right shoulder par tuck kiya jaata hai ya keys/chabi ke bunch se attach kiya jaata hai.

questions.question: Nauvari saree draping kis state ki traditional style hai?

options.B: Maharashtra

questions.explanation: Nauvari saree draping Maharashtra ki traditional style hai, jismein saree ko pant-style mein drape kiya jaata hai.

questions.question: Seedha pallu style draping mein pallu kis direction mein aata hai?

options.B: Back se right shoulder par

questions.explanation: Seedha pallu style mein pallu ko front se right shoulder par drape kiya jaata hai, jo khas taur par Gujarat aur Rajasthan mein popular hai.

questions.question: Nauvari saree drape karne ke liye kya zaroori hai?

options.B: 9-yard (nau-vaar) lambi saree

questions.explanation: Nauvari drape ke liye traditionally 9-yard lambi saree ki zaroorat hoti hai, jisse pant-style drape achieve kiya ja sake.

questions.question: Kodagu style draping kis region se belong karti hai?

options.B: Karnataka (Coorg)

questions.explanation: Kodagu style draping Karnataka ke Coorg region se hai, jismein pleats back mein tuck kiye jaate hain aur pallu front se drape hota hai.

questions.question: Mundanai (double pallu) style draping kis state mein popular hai?

options.B: West Bengal

questions.explanation: Mundanai ya double pallu style Bengali weddings aur festive occasions mein dekha jaata hai, jismein ek pallu front se aur doosra back se drape hota hai.

questions.question: Agar client ko ek unique aur traditional South Indian look chahiye, toh aap konsi style recommend karenge?

options.B: Nivi style

questions.explanation: Madisaru style ek traditional Tamil Brahmin drape hai jo 9-yard saree se kiya jaata hai aur ismein koi petticoat nahi pehna jaata, ek distinct South Indian look deta hai.

questions.question: Assamese 'Mekhela Chadar' technically saree nahi hai, but iska draping style kaisa hota hai?

options.B: Two separate pieces: a skirt and a stole

questions.explanation: Mekhela Chadar mein do alag-alag pieces hote hain: 'Mekhela' (skirt-like bottom) aur 'Chadar' (upper part, like a stole), jo saree ki tarah drape kiye jaate hain.

questions.question: Parsi 'Gara' saree draping mein pallu ko kaise set kiya jaata hai?

options.B: Back se seedha left shoulder par aur phir front mein loose
options.C: Front se right shoulder par pleated

questions.explanation: Parsi Gara style mein pallu back se left shoulder par aata hai aur phir front mein loose aur graceful tarike se drape hota hai, often without many pins.

questions.question: Agar client ko traditional look chahiye without much hassle, toh kaunsi regional style Nivi ke baad sabse common hai?

options.B: Gujarati Seedha Pallu

questions.explanation: Nivi ke baad Gujarati Seedha Pallu ek bahut common aur relatively easy traditional style hai jo elegant look deta hai.

questions.question: Kerala ki traditional 'Kasavu' saree ka primary colour combination kya hota hai?

options.B: White/Off-white and Gold

questions.explanation: Kerala ki Kasavu sarees apni white ya off-white body aur golden zari border ke liye jaani jaati hain, jo unhe ek distinct traditional look deta hai.

questions.question: Konkanastha Brahmin style mein saree draping Nauvari se kaise alag hai?

options.B: Yeh 6-yard saree se banti hai
options.C: Ismein pleats ko back mein tuck kiya jaata hai
options.D: Ismein pallu ko front mein pin kiya jaata hai

questions.explanation: Konkanastha Brahmin style Nauvari ki tarah hi 9-yard saree se banta hai, lekin ismein front pleats back mein tuck kiye jaate hain, jo isse thoda alag look deta hai.

questions.question: Agar client ko comfort aur ease of movement chahiye, toh kaunsi regional style Nivi ke compare mein better ho sakti hai?

options.B: Bengali style (with double pallu)

questions.explanation: Nauvari style mein saree ko pant-style mein drape kiya jaata hai, jo bahut comfortable hota hai aur movement mein kaafi freedom deta hai, especially for active events.

questions.question: Ghagra style saree draping kahan se originate hua?

options.B: Rajasthan aur Gujarat

questions.explanation: Ghagra style saree draping Rajasthan aur Gujarat mein popular hai, jahan saree ko lehenga ya ghagra ke upar drape kiya jaata hai ya saree ko hi ghagra ki tarah style kiya jaata hai.

questions.question: Konse regional drape mein saree ko 'kachha' style mein pehna jaata hai, jahan lower part pant-like hota hai?

options.B: Bengali

questions.explanation: Nauvari drape ko 'kachha' style bhi kehte hain, jismein saree ke lower portion ko legs ke beech se laakar back mein tuck kiya jaata hai, giving a pant-like appearance.

questions.question: Odia drape (Odisha) ki kya khas baat hai?

options.A: Ismein pallu ko kamar par bandha jaata hai
options.B: Ismein saree ka ek end body ke around waist par wrap hota hai
options.C: Ismein pleats ko front mein bahut tight kiya jaata hai
options.D: Ismein pallu ko head par cover kiya jaata hai

questions.explanation: Odia drape mein saree ka ek end body ke around waist par wrap hota hai, aur phir doosra end pallu ki tarah use hota hai, jo isse ek unique silhouette deta hai.

questions.question: Dhoti style saree draping kaunse region mein zyada common hai, especially for men in traditional attire?

options.B: South India

questions.explanation: Dhoti style draping South India mein zyada common hai, jahan yeh traditional attire ka hissa hai, aur ise men bhi pehnte hain.

questions.question: Mermaid style saree draping kis body type ko complement karta hai?

options.B: Pear-shaped

questions.explanation: Mermaid style saree draping hourglass aur slim figures ko best complement karta hai kyunki yeh curves ko accentuate karta hai aur figure-hugging hota hai.

questions.question: Lehenga style saree drape karne ka primary benefit kya hai?

options.B: Lehenga aur saree ka combined look dena without wearing a lehenga

questions.explanation: Lehenga style saree draping se ek heavy lehenga look milta hai without actually wearing a lehenga, jisse convenience bhi badhti hai.

questions.question: Pant style saree draping mein kya bottom wear use hota hai?

options.B: Leggings ya pants

questions.explanation: Pant style saree draping mein petticoat ki jagah leggings, cigarette pants ya trousers pehne jaate hain, jiske upar saree ko drape kiya jaata hai.

questions.question: Agar client petite height ki hai, toh unhe konsi draping style avoid karni chahiye?

options.B: Mermaid style

questions.explanation: Petite figures ko loose aur voluminous drapes avoid karne chahiye kyunki yeh unki height ko aur kam dikha sakte hain. Figure-hugging aur neat drapes better hote hain.

questions.question: Butterfly style pallu mein kya khas hota hai?

options.B: Pallu ko front mein butterfly wings ki tarah spread kiya jaata hai
options.C: Pallu ko back mein tuck kiya jaata hai
options.D: Pallu ko head par cover kiya jaata hai

questions.explanation: Butterfly style pallu mein pallu ko bahut fine pleats mein bana kar front mein butterfly wings ki tarah spread kiya jaata hai, jisse ek glamorous look milta hai.

questions.question: Agar client ki body type heavy hai, toh unhe kis type ke fabric ki saree recommend karni chahiye?

options.B: Heavy Kanjeevaram

questions.explanation: Heavy body types ko lightweight aur flowy fabrics jaise georgette, chiffon, ya crepe recommend karne chahiye kyunki yeh body par acchi tarah drape hote hain aur volume add nahi karte.

questions.question: Gown style saree draping kis occasion ke liye best hai?

options.B: Office wear
options.C: Cocktail parties aur red carpet events

questions.explanation: Gown style saree draping modern, glamorous aur westernized look deta hai, jo cocktail parties, receptions aur red carpet events ke liye ideal hai.

questions.question: Draping karte waqt, agar client ko shoulder area mein bulkiness pasand nahi hai, toh pallu ko kaise adjust karna chahiye?

options.A: Pallu ko bahut zyada pleats mein banana chahiye
options.B: Pallu ko open drape karna chahiye ya minimal pleats mein karna chahiye
options.C: Pallu ko tight pin karna chahiye
options.D: Pallu ko front mein laana chahiye

questions.explanation: Shoulder area mein bulkiness avoid karne ke liye pallu ko open drape karna chahiye ya minimal, neat pleats mein karna chahiye, jisse ek sleek look mile.

questions.question: Agar client ka bust area heavy hai, toh blouse ka neckline kaisa hona chahiye?

options.B: Boat neck

questions.explanation: Heavy bust area ke liye V-neck ya U-neck blouses recommend kiye jaate hain kyunki yeh neckline ko elongate karte hain aur proportion ko balance karte hain.

questions.question: Waist-cinching belt ka use kis type ke drape mein common hai?

options.B: Nauvari
options.C: Modern, pre-draped ya designer saree styles

questions.explanation: Waist-cinching belts modern aur designer saree styles mein bahut common hain, jo waist ko define karte hain aur ek stylish look dete hain.

questions.question: Draping ke dauran, agar client ko comfortable rehna hai aur unhe dancing bhi karni hai, toh kya option best hai?

options.A: Heavy silk saree with tight pleats
options.B: Lehenga style saree
options.C: Pant style saree ya pre-stitched saree

questions.explanation: Dancing aur comfort ke liye pant style saree ya pre-stitched saree best hain kyunki yeh movement ki full freedom dete hain aur drape ke kharab hone ka dar kam hota hai.

questions.question: Agar client ko ek contemporary aur indo-western look chahiye, toh aap kaunsi draping technique use karenge?

options.B: Gown style saree ya dhoti style with a modern twist

questions.explanation: Gown style saree, dhoti style with a modern twist (e.g., with a belt), ya pre-draped fusion sarees contemporary aur Indo-western look ke liye best hain.

questions.question: Draping mein 'pleat-less' ya 'open pallu' style kab prefer kiya jaata hai?

options.B: Jab saree ka border ya pallu ka design dikhana ho
options.C: Jab client ko traditional look chahiye
options.D: Jab saree ka fabric stiff ho

questions.explanation: Open pallu style tab prefer kiya jaata hai jab pallu par intricate work ho ya border bahut sundar ho, jise dikhana ho. Yeh ek relaxed aur elegant look deta hai.

questions.question: Agar client ka hip area broad hai (pear-shaped), toh pleats ko kaise place karna chahiye?

options.A: Pleats ko bahut tight karke front mein center mein tuck karna chahiye
options.B: Pleats ko thoda left ya right shift karke tuck karna chahiye, not exactly in the center
options.C: Pleats ko bahut zyada volume dena chahiye
options.D: Pleats ko back mein tuck karna chahiye

questions.explanation: Pear-shaped body type mein pleats ko center se thoda left ya right shift karke tuck karna chahiye, taaki hip area par zyada volume na aaye aur silhouette balanced lage.

questions.question: Saree draping mein 'double drape' technique ka kya purpose hai?

options.B: Ek hi saree ko do alag-alag fabrics se banaya jaana
options.C: Do sarees ko ek saath drape karna ya ek hi saree ko do baar drape karna for a layered look

questions.explanation: Double drape technique mein ya toh do sarees ko ek saath drape kiya jaata hai, ya ek hi saree ko is tarah se drape kiya jaata hai ki ek layered aur voluminous look mile, often used for bridal wear.

questions.question: Agar client ko ek sleek aur minimal look chahiye, toh kaunsi draping style best hogi?

options.B: Mermaid style with minimal pleats

questions.explanation: Sleek aur minimal look ke liye mermaid style jismein pleats bahut neat aur minimal ho, ya open pallu style, best rehta hai. Yeh body ki curves ko smoothly follow karta hai.

questions.question: Saree draping mein 'pre-pleated' method ka kya fayda hai?

options.A: Yeh saree ko zyada traditional banata hai
options.B: Yeh draping process ko quick aur easy banata hai
options.C: Yeh saree ko zyada heavy banata hai
options.D: Yeh sirf designer sarees ke liye hota hai

questions.explanation: Pre-pleated method mein pleats ko pehle se hi iron karke ya stitch karke ready rakha jaata hai, jisse draping process bahut quick aur easy ho jaata hai, especially for events.

questions.question: Saree ke saath kis type ka blouse pehna jaana chahiye, yeh kis par depend karta hai?

options.B: Saree ka fabric, occasion aur client ki body type

questions.explanation: Blouse ka selection saree ke fabric, occasion (casual, formal), aur client ki body type ke according hona chahiye, taaki ek harmonious look mile.

questions.question: Agar client ko modern aur stylish look chahiye, toh aap kaunsi blouse neckline recommend karenge?

options.B: Simple round neck

questions.explanation: Modern aur stylish look ke liye halter neck, off-shoulder, ya deep back neck designs wale blouses recommend kiye ja sakte hain.

questions.question: Heavy Kanjeevaram saree ke saath generally kis type ki jewellery pehni jaati hai?

options.B: Heavy traditional gold jewellery

questions.explanation: Heavy Kanjeevaram sarees ke saath heavy traditional gold jewellery jaise temple jewellery ya antique gold sets best match karte hain.

questions.question: Saree draping ke baad, kaunsa footwear style client ke overall look ko enhance karta hai, especially for traditional events?

options.B: Flats ya traditional juttis/heels

questions.explanation: Traditional events ke liye flats, embellished juttis, ya comfortable heels saree look ko complete karte hain. Comfort bhi important hai.

questions.question: Shapewear petticoat ka kya fayda hai over a normal petticoat?

options.A: Yeh zyada colour options mein aata hai
options.B: Yeh body ko smooth aur streamlined shape deta hai
options.D: Yeh sirf designer sarees ke liye hai

questions.explanation: Shapewear petticoat body ko ek smooth aur streamlined silhouette deta hai, jisse saree ka fall aur drape bahut accha aata hai. Yeh bulges ko hide karta hai.

questions.question: Agar client ko saree ke saath ek 'statement' look chahiye, toh aap jewellery mein kya suggest karenge?

options.B: A single statement necklace ya heavy jhumkas

questions.explanation: Statement look ke liye ek bold necklace, heavy jhumkas, ya ek large cocktail ring suggest kiya ja sakta hai jo overall outfit ko elevate kare.

questions.question: Saree ke saath hair styling karte waqt kya dhyan mein rakhna chahiye?

options.B: Saree ka style, occasion aur client ka face cut

questions.explanation: Hair styling saree ke style (traditional, modern), occasion, aur client ke face cut ke according honi chahiye. Updos traditional sarees ke saath acche lagte hain, jabki open hair modern drapes ke saath.

questions.question: Agar client ki saree bahut simple hai, toh look ko kaise enhance kiya ja sakta hai?

options.A: Aur ek simple saree pehen kar
options.B: Statement blouse, heavy jewellery ya stylish belt add karke

questions.explanation: Simple saree ko enhance karne ke liye ek designer ya embellished blouse, statement jewellery, ek stylish belt, ya ek unique draping style choose kiya ja sakta hai.

questions.question: Saree ke colour ke saath makeup tones kaise coordinate karne chahiye?

options.B: Saree ke undertones se match karte hue ya complementary colours choose karein

questions.explanation: Makeup tones ko saree ke undertones se match karna ya complementary colours choose karna overall look ko harmonious banata hai. Jaise, warm-toned saree ke saath warm makeup tones.

questions.question: Saree ke saath clutches aur handbags ka selection kaise karna chahiye?

options.B: Occasion, saree ka style aur overall aesthetic se match karte hue

questions.explanation: Clutches aur handbags ko occasion (e.g., small clutch for party, larger bag for day event) aur saree ke style se match karna chahiye, taaki look complete lage.

questions.question: Agar client ko ek 'bohemian' fusion look chahiye, toh saree ke saath kya suggest karenge?

options.B: Layered silver jewellery, long jackets ya capes, aur messy bun

questions.explanation: Bohemian fusion look ke liye layered silver jewellery, long jackets/capes, tassels, messy bun, aur relaxed draping styles suggest kiye jaate hain.

questions.question: Blouse sleeves ki length aur style ka selection kis baat par depend karta hai?

options.B: Client ki arm shape, comfort aur occasion

questions.explanation: Sleeve length aur style client ki arm shape (e.g., full sleeves for heavy arms), comfort level, aur occasion (e.g., short sleeves for casual, full for formal) par depend karte hain.

questions.question: Saree ke saath waist belt pehne ka kya advantage hai?

options.B: Waist ko define karna aur ek modern touch dena

questions.explanation: Waist belt saree look ko modernize karta hai, waist ko define karta hai, aur ek structured silhouette deta hai.

questions.question: Agar client ki saree mein heavy border hai, toh blouse ka design kaisa hona chahiye?

options.B: Simple aur plain, taki border highlight ho

questions.explanation: Heavy border wali saree ke saath simple aur plain blouse design choose karna chahiye, taki saree ka border aur pallu highlight ho, aur overall look balanced rahe.

questions.question: Saree ke saath bangles aur bracelets ka selection kaise karna chahiye?

options.B: Saree ke colour, work aur overall jewellery set se match karte hue

questions.explanation: Bangles aur bracelets ko saree ke colour, uske work (zari, embroidery), aur baaki jewellery (necklace, earrings) se coordinate karna chahiye.

questions.question: Saree styling mein 'contrast' ka kya role hai?

options.B: Elements ko ek dusre se alag dikhana aur visual interest add karna
options.C: Sirf ek hi colour use karna

questions.explanation: Contrast styling mein alag-alag colours, textures ya styles ko combine kiya jaata hai, jaise plain saree ke saath embellished blouse, jo look mein visual interest aur depth add karta hai.

questions.question: Client consultation mein sabse pehla step kya hona chahiye?

options.B: Client se unki preferences, occasion aur comfort level ke baare mein puchna
options.C: Apne pasand ki style impose karna

questions.explanation: Client consultation mein sabse pehle unki preferences, occasion, body type, aur comfort level ko samajhna zaroori hai, taaki unki zaroorat ke hisaab se best service provide ki ja sake.

questions.question: Saree draping ke dauran hygiene maintain karne ke liye kya zaroori hai?

options.B: Clean hands, sanitized tools aur clean working area

questions.explanation: Professional draping mein clean hands, sanitized tools, aur ek clean working area maintain karna bahut zaroori hai for client's safety aur satisfaction.

questions.question: Agar client ko draping ke baad saree mein koi discomfort feel ho, toh ek professional ko kya karna chahiye?

options.B: Unki feedback sunna chahiye aur adjustments karne chahiye
options.C: Unhe bolna chahiye ki yeh normal hai
options.D: Unhe payment karne ke liye bolna chahiye

questions.explanation: Client ki discomfort ko sunna aur zaroorat ke hisaab se adjustments karna ek professional ka kaam hai, jisse client satisfied rahe.

questions.question: Ek successful saree drape artist ke liye 'time management' kyu important hai?

options.A: Taki woh zyada clients handle kar sake
options.B: Taki client ko wait na karna pade aur event ke liye time par ready ho sake
options.C: Taki woh jaldi ghar ja sake
options.D: Taki woh zyada charge kar sake

questions.explanation: Time management bahut crucial hai taaki client apne event ke liye time par ready ho sake aur aap next appointment ke liye bhi timely proceed kar saken.

questions.question: Apna professional portfolio banane ka kya fayda hai?

options.B: Future clients ko apni skills aur work dikhane ke liye
options.C: Apne friends ko impress karne ke liye
options.D: Draping styles ko bhoolne se bachane ke liye

questions.explanation: Ek strong portfolio future clients ko aapki skills, creativity aur experience dikhata hai, jo business grow karne ke liye essential hai.

questions.question: Agar client ek particular draping style ke liye insist karta hai jo unki body type par acchi nahi lagegi, toh aap kaise handle karenge?

options.A: Unki baat maan lenge bina soche
options.B: Unhe politely advise karenge aur alternatives suggest karenge
options.C: Unhe batayenge ki unki choice galat hai
options.D: Draping karne se mana kar denge

questions.explanation: Ek professional ko client ko politely educate karna chahiye ki kaunsi style un par best lagegi aur alternatives suggest karne chahiye, unki preferences ko bhi respect karte hue.

questions.question: Pricing strategies set karte waqt kin factors ko dhyan mein rakhna chahiye?

options.B: Market rates, experience, location, service type aur client ki purchasing power

questions.explanation: Pricing set karte waqt market rates, apni experience, location, service ki complexity aur client ki purchasing power jaise factors ko consider karna chahiye.

questions.question: Client retention ke liye kya important hai?

options.B: Excellent service, good communication aur follow-up
options.D: Sirf naye clients par focus karna

questions.explanation: Client retention ke liye excellent service provide karna, unse acchi communication maintain karna, aur zaroorat padne par follow-up karna bahut important hai.

questions.question: Apni services ko promote karne ke liye kaunse platforms effective ho sakte hain?

options.B: Social media (Instagram, Facebook), local beauty salons, wedding planners se collaboration

questions.explanation: Social media, local beauty salons, wedding planners se collaboration, aur online listings jaise platforms apni services ko promote karne ke liye bahut effective hain.

questions.question: Agar draping ke dauran saree par koi stain lag jaaye, toh kya karna chahiye?

options.B: Stain ko ignore karna chahiye
options.C: Politely inform karna chahiye aur solution offer karna chahiye (e.g., professional cleaning)
options.D: Saree ko change karne ke liye bolna chahiye

questions.explanation: Professional ethics ke according, client ko politely inform karna chahiye aur stain removal ya cleaning jaise solutions offer karne chahiye. Responsibility lena important hai.

questions.question: Client feedback ka kya mahatva hai?

options.B: Apni services ko improve karne aur business grow karne ke liye essential hai

questions.explanation: Client feedback (positive aur negative dono) apni services ko improve karne, flaws ko theek karne aur business ko grow karne ke liye bahut valuable hota hai.

questions.question: Ek professional saree drape artist ko kis type ke clients ke saath deal karna pad sakta hai?

options.B: Har type ke clients, including demanding ya indecisive ones

questions.explanation: Ek professional ko har type ke clients ke saath deal karna pad sakta hai, jismein demanding, indecisive, ya last-minute change karne wale clients bhi shamil hote hain. Patience aur flexibility zaroori hai.

questions.question: Apni skills ko update rakhne ke liye kya karna chahiye?

options.B: Regularly new trends seekhna, workshops attend karna aur practice karte rehna

questions.explanation: Fashion industry mein trends change hote rehte hain, isliye apni skills ko update rakhne ke liye naye trends seekhna, workshops attend karna aur continuous practice karna zaroori hai.

questions.question: Ek professional drape artist ko 'client's privacy' ka kaise dhyan rakhna chahiye?

options.B: Unki pictures bina permission ke share karna
options.C: Unki personal information ko secret rakhna aur pictures share karne se pehle permission lena

questions.explanation: Client's privacy ko respect karna ek ethical practice hai. Unki personal details ko secret rakhna chahiye aur unki pictures ko social media par share karne se pehle hamesha permission leni chahiye.

questions.question: Agar client ko emergency mein draping chahiye, toh aapko kya karna chahiye?

options.B: Agar possible ho toh accommodate karne ki koshish karni chahiye, ho sake toh extra charge ke saath
options.C: Unko wait karne ke liye bolna chahiye

questions.explanation: Ek professional ko emergency requests ko accommodate karne ki koshish karni chahiye, agar schedule allow karta hai. Iske liye ek 'rush fee' charge karna bhi acceptable hota hai.

questions.question: Apne work ke liye 'insurance' lena kyu beneficial ho sakta hai?

options.B: Client ya property ko accidental damage hone par financial protection deta hai
options.C: Yeh sirf bade businesses ke liye hai
options.D: Iska koi practical use nahi hai

questions.explanation: Professional liability insurance accidental damages (jaise client ki saree ko nuksan ya property damage) ke cases mein financial protection provide karta hai, jo ek professional ke liye bahut beneficial hai.
